records.ety: [NL. embrocatus, p. p. of embrocare; cf. Gr. <?/ lotion, fomentation, fr. <?/ to foment; <?/ in + <?/ to wet.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Embrocated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Embrocating.]

defs: To moisten and rub (a diseased part) with a liquid substance, as with spirit, oil, etc., by means of a cloth or sponge.
